creator: sirdice@xs4all.nl
text:
Somehow I couldn't attach the file, I'll past it here:

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	xkeyboard-config
#	xkeyboard-config/distinfo
#	xkeyboard-config/Makefile
#	xkeyboard-config/pkg-descr
#	xkeyboard-config/pkg-plist
#
echo c - xkeyboard-config
mkdir -p xkeyboard-config > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xkeyboard-config/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >xkeyboard-config/distinfo << 
'END-of-xkeyboard-config/distinfo'
XMD5 (xorg/data/xkeyboard-config-0.9.tar.bz2) = 
52afe60101ace8532881e70f6c2dc020
XSHA256 (xorg/data/xkeyboard-config-0.9.tar.bz2) = 
bb84c40036c4eab0f88bf09951bf36c867d0196988636edfd6efa14d61be777d
XSIZE (xorg/data/xkeyboard-config-0.9.tar.bz2) = 471807
END-of-xkeyboard-config/distinfo
echo x - xkeyboard-config/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xkeyboard-config/Makefile << 
'END-of-xkeyboard-config/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	xkeyboard-config
X# Date created:							18 December 2006
X# Whom:									Remko Catersels
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=		xkeyboard-config
XPORTVERSION=	0.9
XCATEGORIES=		x11
XMASTER_SITES=	http://xlibs.freedesktop.org/xkbdesc/
X
XMAINTAINER=		sirdice@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=		The non-arch keyboard configuration database for X Window
X
X#USE_XLIB=		yes					# Depricated
X# Not sure about these:
XUSE_XORG=		kbproto
XXORG_CAT=		data
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_BZIP2=		yes
XUSE_GMAKE=		yes	
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=		xkbcomp:${PORTSDIR}/x11/xkbcomp \
X					intltool-extract:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/intltool \
X				 
${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/XML/Parser.pm:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Parser
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+= --with-xkb_base=${PREFIX}/share/X11/xkb \
X				 --with-xkb-rules-symlink=xorg
X
Xpost-install:
X		${MKDIR} ${DESTDIR}/var/lib/xkb
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xkeyboard-config/Makefile
echo x - xkeyboard-config/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >xkeyboard-config/pkg-descr << 
'END-of-xkeyboard-config/pkg-descr'
XThe non-arch keyboard configuration database for X Window. The goal is to
Xprovide the consistent, well-structured, frequently released open source
Xof X keyboard configuration data for X Window System implementations
X(free, open source and commercial). The project is targetted to XKB-based
Xsystems.
X
XWWW: http://www.freedesktop.org/wiki/Software/XKeyboardConfig
END-of-xkeyboard-config/pkg-descr
echo x - xkeyboard-config/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >xkeyboard-config/pkg-plist << 
'END-of-xkeyboard-config/pkg-plist'
